# Exode API

> Exode — an EdTech SaaS platform for online schools. REST API under the `/saas/v2` prefix (base `https://api.exode.biz`) for managing users, HR/staff, groups, courses, accesses, forms, exports, and webhooks. Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` plus the `Seller-Id` and `School-Id` headers. Every response is wrapped in `{ success, code, payload }`.

Complete machine-readable reference for all methods, parameters, entities, and webhooks on a single page: https://docs.exode.biz/llms-full.md

## Getting started

- [Introduction](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/welcome): API overview and entry points.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/quickstart): your first request in 5 steps.
- [Core concepts](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/concepts): the data model (seller, school, users, courses, products, accesses, payments).
- [Working with the API](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/setup): base URL, authentication, response and error format, rate limits, pagination.
- [Webhooks](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/webhooks/about): outbound events, signature, retries.

## Methods — Users

- [Create a user](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/create): `POST /saas/v2/user/create`.
- [Update a user](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/update): `PUT /saas/v2/user/:userId/update`.
- [Upsert a user](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/upsert): `PUT /saas/v2/user/upsert`.
- [Find a user](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/find): `GET /saas/v2/user/find`.
- [Bulk-find users](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/find-many): `POST /saas/v2/user/find-many`.
- [List users](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/list): `GET /saas/v2/user/list`.
- [Delete users](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/delete-many): `DELETE /saas/v2/user/delete-many`.
- [User states](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/state): `GET|PUT /saas/v2/user/:userId/state/{get,set}`.
- [Session token](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/user/session/auth-token): `POST /saas/v2/user/session/auth-token` (auto-login via `?___uat=<token>`).

## Methods — Staff (HR)

- [HR system sync guide](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/staff/sync-guide): how to keep the org structure in sync with an external HR system.
- [Departments](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/staff/department): `GET /saas/v2/staff/department/tree` (also `list`, `create`, `update`, `delete`; `ext/{extId}` variants).
- [Positions](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/staff/position): `GET /saas/v2/staff/position/list` (also `create`, `update`, `delete`).
- [Employments](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/staff/employment): `GET /saas/v2/staff/employment/list` (also `hire`, `promote`, `transfer`, `terminate`).
- [Department managers](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/staff/department-manager): `POST /saas/v2/staff/department-manager/set` (also `remove`).
- [Absences](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/staff/absence): `GET /saas/v2/staff/absence/list` (also `create`, `update`, `delete`).
- [Sync example (1C)](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/integrations/examples/1c-staff-sync): end-to-end staff-sync example via `ext/{extId}` endpoints.

## Methods — Groups

- [List groups](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/group/list): `GET /saas/v2/group/list/raw`.
- [Add members](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/group-member/create-many): `POST /saas/v2/group/:groupId/member/create-many`.
- [Remove members](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/group-member/delete-many): `DELETE /saas/v2/group/:groupId/member/delete-many`.

## Methods — Courses

- [List courses](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/course/list): `GET /saas/v2/course/list/raw`.
- [Course progress](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/course/progresses): `GET /saas/v2/course/:courseId/progresses`.

## Methods — Accesses and sales

- [List product accesses](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/product-access/list): `GET /saas/v2/product-access/list/raw`.
- [List invoices](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/invoice/list): `GET /saas/v2/invoice/list/raw`.

## Methods — Forms and custom fields

- [List form layouts](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/form-layout/list): `GET /saas/v2/form/layout/list`.
- [Create a form layout](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/form-layout/create): `POST /saas/v2/form/layout/create`.
- [Update a form layout](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/form-layout/update): `PUT /saas/v2/form/layout/:layoutId/update`.
- [Delete a form layout](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/form-layout/delete): `DELETE /saas/v2/form/layout/:layoutId/delete`.
- [Get field values](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/custom-field/get): `GET /saas/v2/form/custom-field/value/get`.
- [Set field values](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/custom-field/set): `POST /saas/v2/form/custom-field/value/{set,set-by-slug}`.

## Methods — Reports and exports

- [Request a generation](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/query-export/generate): `POST /saas/v2/query-export/generate` (asynchronous, limit 100/hour).
- [Get the result](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/query-export/result): `GET /saas/v2/workflow-execution/:executionUuid/result`.
- [Report: school users](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/query-export/school-user-find-many): type `QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_SCHOOL_USER_FIND_MANY`.
- [Report: school students](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/query-export/school-student-find-many): type `QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_SCHOOL_STUDENT_FIND_MANY`.
- [Report: group members](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/query-export/group-member-find-many): type `QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_GROUP_MEMBER_FIND_MANY`.
- [Report: practice attempts](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/query-export/practice-attempt-find-many): type `QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_COURSE_LESSON_PRACTICE_ATTEMPT_FIND_MANY`.
- [Report: invoices](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/query-export/invoice-manage-find-many): type `QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_INVOICE_MANAGE_FIND_MANY`.
- [Report: product billing accesses](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/query-export/product-billing-access-find-many): type `QUERY_EXPORT_TYPE_PRODUCT_BILLING_ACCESS_FIND_MANY`.

## Objects (structures based on zod schemas)

- [API objects](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/index): overview of all entities.
- [User](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/user): `user`, `profile`.
- [Session](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/session): `session`.
- [Group](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/group) and [Group member](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/group-member).
- [Course and learning](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/course): `course`, `courseProgress`, `courseLesson`, `courseLessonPractice`, `courseLessonPracticeAttempt`.
- [Product and accesses](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/product): `product`, `productAccess`, `productPrice`, `discount`.
- [Payment and invoice](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/payment): `payment`, `invoice`, `invoiceProduct`, `acquiring`.
- [School and seller](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/school): `school`, `seller`, `organization`.
- [Forms and fields](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/objects/entities/form): `formLayout`, `formFieldValue`.

## Integrations

- [Telegram Mini App](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/iframe/tg-mini-app): auto-authorization via `?___uat=<token>`.
- [Mobile app deep link](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/deep-link/mobile-app): auto-login into the mobile app via a session token.
- [Custom JS code](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/school/custom-code/js-config): customizing the platform interface.

## SDK (@exode-team/sdk)

Official npm package: a typed server-side REST API client plus a bridge for embeddable mini apps.

- [SDK overview](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-sdk/overview): package modules and version.
- [Installation](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-sdk/installation): npm/CDN, imports.
- [API Client](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-sdk/api-client): `ExodeAPI` — 7 `school.*` resources, validation, errors.
- [MiniApp](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-sdk/miniapp/introduction): bridge, commands, events, [React hooks](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-sdk/miniapp/react).
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@exode-team/sdk

## Optional

- [Request a new method](https://docs.exode.biz/ru/exode-api/common/request-new-method): missing an endpoint? how to ask for one.
- [Support](https://t.me/exode_support_biz): creating a service user and issuing an API token.
